name: expomela
description: Expo Mela (expomela.com) - Exhibition & Stall Booking Platform (React + Turso/libSQL)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.render-build: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run seed
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed
